label: Technology
description: How the tools, systems, and innovations shaping our digital world actually work — from AI and blockchain to cloud computing and cybersecurity.

label: Science
description: The natural world explained — physics, chemistry, biology, astronomy, and the scientific method itself.

label: Mathematics
description: Numbers, patterns, and logic. From basic arithmetic concepts to the abstract structures that underpin modern science.

label: Finance
description: Money, markets, and economic decisions. Understanding the financial systems that affect everyday life.

label: Philosophy
description: The big questions — existence, knowledge, ethics, logic, and the nature of mind. Ideas that have shaped how we think.

label: History
description: People, events, and movements that shaped the world we live in. From ancient civilizations to the modern era.

label: Psychology
description: How the human mind works — behavior, cognition, emotion, development, and the science behind why we do what we do.

label: Health & Wellness
description: The human body, medicine, nutrition, and mental health. Understanding what keeps us healthy and what happens when things go wrong.

label: Economics
description: How societies allocate resources, from supply and demand to macroeconomic policy and international trade.

label: Law
description: Legal concepts, systems, and principles — from constitutional law to criminal justice and intellectual property.

label: Arts & Culture
description: Creative expression across mediums — visual art, literature, film, architecture, and the cultural movements that define eras.

label: Social Sciences
description: The study of human society — sociology, anthropology, political science, and how people organize themselves.

label: Everyday Concepts
description: Common terms and ideas you encounter daily, explained clearly so they actually make sense.

label: Business
description: How organizations operate — management, strategy, entrepreneurship, and the mechanics of running a company.

label: Education
description: Learning, teaching, and educational systems — from pedagogy and curricula to the philosophy of education.

label: Sports
description: Athletics, competition, and the games we play — rules, history, and the science of physical performance.

label: Music
description: Sound, rhythm, and harmony. From music theory fundamentals to genres, instruments, and the physics of sound.

label: Food & Drink
description: Culinary concepts, cooking techniques, ingredients, and the science behind what we eat and drink.

label: Language
description: How human language works — linguistics, grammar, semantics, and the remarkable system we use to communicate.

label: Engineering
description: Applying science to solve real problems — civil, mechanical, electrical, and software engineering concepts.

label: Biology & Medicine
description: Life sciences and medical knowledge — from cellular biology to clinical medicine and public health.

label: Geography
description: The Earth's landscapes, climates, peoples, and places — physical and human geography explained.

label: Religion
description: World religions, spiritual practices, and belief systems — their histories, teachings, and cultural impact.

label: Politics
description: Government, power, and public policy — how political systems work and the ideologies that drive them.

label: Marketing
description: How businesses reach and persuade audiences — branding, advertising, digital marketing, and consumer behavior.
